steps.title: Calculate attendees at first and second workshops
steps.content:
42% of the 1,250 people who attended the first workshop also attended the second workshop. Compute this percentage:
$$0.42 \times 1,250 = 525$$
So 525 people attended both the first and second workshops.

steps.title: Calculate attendees at all three workshops
steps.content:
32% of those 525 people who attended both the first and second workshops also attended the third workshop. Compute this percentage:
$$0.32 \times 525 = 168$$
Therefore, 168 people attended all three workshops.
